title: 13th Breast Cancer Music Festival
description: Raised roughly $30K for the Stony Brook Cancer Foundation. Our biggest year yet with incredible community turnout.

title: Bra-Tender Competition 2025
description: 30 establishments across Long Island competed to raise the most money. An incredible display of community spirit.

title: Toys for Shots & Food Drive 2024
description: Partnered with Toys for Tots and St. Philip and James Church to bring joy and food to families during the holidays.

title: A Decade of Impact
description: Over 10 years of fighting breast cancer on Long Island, establishing one of the most prominent fundraisers in the region.
